title: Praravinia loheri
intro: Praravinia loheri is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Praravinia loheri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Praravinia loheri is commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
